pdf.info: Activate the PDF export engine to render forms as PDF. Activation adopts a Chrome or Chromium binary on this machine — system installs are detected automatically; a managed Chromium download will land in a follow-up release.
pdf.dialog.title: Pick a Chrome / Chromium binary
pdf.dialog.intro: Formidable detected the following candidates. Pick one to activate the PDF export engine.
pdf.dialog.no_candidates: No Chrome or Chromium found on this machine. The managed download path will land in a follow-up release.
